summary: Scaffold, validate, and harden new domain packs from reusable contracts, recipes, and examples.

capabilities.summary: Capture the target domain, deliverables, constraints, and acceptance contract for a new pack.
Generate a new pack skeleton with manifest, recipes, references, and example requests.
Review the pack structure, naming, and workflows so another agent can reuse it safely.
Validate the generated pack against at least one concrete domain example and close any gaps.

workflows.summary: Normalize domain boundaries, users, artifacts, and quality bars before scaffolding.
Create the pack manifest, operating contract, starter recipes, and domain references.
Use one concrete pack request to verify the pack is reusable outside the initial example.
Summarize what the new pack covers, what remains domain-specific, and what to extend next.
